changelog.label:
Refactored the (Simple) version to use the shared JSON-based app content system.
Removed the legacy Skills section from (Simple) and replaced it with the Workspace app.
Synced the display mode warning dialog in (Simple) with the (Standard) version.
Changed Domain from (mqmr.lol) to (mqmr.bio)

Refactored the (Standard) version by moving all text into a global file for each app, ensuring that both (Simple) and (Phone) versions use the same content too in the next update.
Removed the Skills app.
Added the Workspace app.
Updated the Terminal to fix layout issues and to support adding and removing Skills and Workspace app commands.
Updated Settings to improve the Changelog section layout and to add a "What's Next" section.
Updated the Projects app by redesigning the layout, adding buttons to open project links, and enhancing the badge/tag system.
Fixed Fetching Version (Simple), Changed Profile Picture
New Display Mode Has Been Added (Phone), Fixed (Project) App
ew Display Mode Has Been Added (Simple)
Fixed The Terminal, Added a Sign In System, Improved The Design, Added a contact system

Added New App: Settings, 
Changed the font, 
fixed some issues, 
Released The Terminal
